stemHtml: Which of the following scenarios would be worse, with regards to the optical blind spot, whilst flying VFR by day?

options.a: The pilot is looking straight ahead, with a partially obstructed view due to aircraft components, and an aircraft is approaching head on.
options.b: The pilot is alternatively scanning their instruments and the nearby airspace, with a partially obstructed view due to window frames, and an aircraft is flying on a parallel track.
options.c: The pilot is staring out of a side window with unobstruced view, and a nearby aircraft is approaching at an angle.
options.d: The pilot is moving their eyes in saccades, scanning the whole sky, with an unobstructed view, and an aircraft approaching head on.
